title: draba norvegica
intro: Draba norvegica, also known as Norwegian whitlowgrass, is a small annual plant in the family Brassicaceae, native to northern Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Draba norvegica include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and supporting the immune system. Draba norvegica can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and is also used in some traditional remedies to treat respiratory issues and skin conditions.
